data.title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication
data.description: Secure method for API authentication, used to authorize client access to Instagram services.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 framework used for secure user authentication.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures that user data is encrypted in transit and at rest to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 encryption at rest.

data.title: Rate Limiting
data.description: Restricts the number of API requests a user can make in a given time frame to mitigate abuse.
data.technical_spec: Integrated into API management layer to detect and block excessive requests.

data.title: Application Security Testing
data.description: Regular security assessments are conducted to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Account Monitoring and Alerts
data.description: Detect suspicious activities on user accounts and notify the user.
data.technical_spec: AI-driven anomaly detection algorithms monitor for signs of account compromise.
